articles.title: Brazil Takes Lead in Solana ETF Race, Announces Launch Date
articles.description: While the prospect of a Solana ETF (SOL) in the US remains uncertain, Brazil is moving forward confidently. QR Asset Management has announced that its Solana ETF will be available for public offering starting Wednesday, August 21. The ETF will be listed on Brazil’s B3 stock exchange on August 28, with shares priced at R$10 each. Brazil Reveals Launch Date for First Solana...

articles.title: Cardano’s ‘Chang hard fork’ propels it to ZK-Scaling dominance as ADA price falls
articles.description: After completing the scaling and performance-based Basho phase, the Cardano Foundation announced the move to decentralized governance with Voltaire. Data from Cardanoscan revealed that 24% (14) of exchanges were ready for the transition, 36% (21) were in progress, and 40% (23) still needed to start working on the transition.
